description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a black metal receiver and barrel assembly. The rifle features a curved detachable box magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post with a slanted muzzle device. The receiver is robust and rectangular, with a selector lever on the right side and a trigger guard beneath. The wooden components have a natural finish, contrasting with the matte black metal parts. The overall design is utilitarian, with visible screws and rivets, and the rifle appears well-suited for rugged urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, black metal receiver, and a curved magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, with contrasting wood and metal finishes.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle, front sight post, and the narrow profile of the barrel and stock.
description_view_1: A left-side view reveals the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and the selector lever.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from the rear, highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: A right-side view displays the magazine, trigger guard, and the details of the receiver and wooden components.
